Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First recall the standard Procure to Pay P2P process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Procure to Pay P2P process starts with creating a purchase requisition This is followed by approving the purchase requisition to move forward

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After approval a purchase order is issued to the vendor Goods are received and verified against the order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The vendor invoice is received and checked for accuracy Finally the invoice is matched with the purchase order and receipt for payment processing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process includes matching the vendor invoice to the purchase order for verification Payment is released after matching followed by closing the case to complete the transaction

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Standard P2P order involves creating approving and issuing before receiving goods and processing payments Variations can occur but logical sequencing is essential for control and efficiency
